page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC processors running at a base frequency of 2.25 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 32 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This hardware profile is optimized for compute-heavy workloads that require dense processing power rather than massive memory footprints. The server does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio provide a dense compute resource without the added cost of unused memory capacity. This makes the instance highly suitable for CPU-bound tasks such as batch processing, high-performance computing node tasks, compute-heavy web serving, and distributed analytics where memory demands are predictable and moderate.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.8xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, operating at 2.25 GHz with a single thread per core. The system features 64.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying on external network storage, and provides an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The dedicated CPU allocation makes it highly efficient for compute-intensive workloads that do not require high memory density. It is well-suited for batch processing, compute-heavy web serving, and distributed analytics.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m2.8xlarge is a compute-optimized KVM instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 64 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for CPU-heavy workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core AMD EPYC compute-optimized instance with a 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio for intensive processing workloads.

64.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
KVM hypervisor architecture with no bundled local storage or GPUs
Optimized for compute-heavy workloads, batch processing, and distributed analytics
